task_completion.description: Weasis application is open and displaying a DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is visible on screen with a medical image loaded in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: A horizontal reference line is drawn across the center of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A straight horizontal line annotation is visible across the center of the DICOM image in Weasis.

task_completion.description: The spatial scale calibration tool is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spatial calibration dialog is open, or there is visual indication that the pixel spacing/scale has been modified in the Weasis interface.

task_completion.description: A measurement overlay documents the calibration showing exactly 50 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement tool (e.g., a ruler or line annotation) is visible on the image with an accompanying text overlay explicitly reading '50 mm'.

task_completion.description: The viewer screen is exported as a JPEG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, terminal command, or file manager shows the image being saved to or existing at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/calibrated_scale.jpg'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Weasis GUI to perform the calibration and measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with Weasis menus, tools, and dialogs, rather than relying solely on terminal commands to spoof the output.

integrity.description: The measurement overlay is a native Weasis annotation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The '50 mm' text and line match the standard Weasis measurement tool styling, and were not added using an external image editor like GIMP or MS Paint.

integrity.description: The exported JPEG is a genuine export of the Weasis viewer screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved file '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/calibrated_scale.jpg' visually matches the Weasis viewer area seen in earlier steps, rather than being a downloaded or pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path for the JPEG is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/calibrated_scale.jpg'. The target measurement value for the overlay must be exactly 50 mm.
